docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
Structured roadmap for GigaChain integration into portfolio-system-architect. Focus: RAG-chain with GigaChat, MCP bridge, proof storage. MVP: Infra + Plan doc.

MVP Priorities: 1. Infra (venv/.env/Chroma), 2. MCP Bridge, 3. RAG + Trace-Storage.

Timeline: Aggressive sprint (2-4 weeks).

docs.title: 1. Infrastructure Preparation
docs.text:
• venv setup: python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate (or Windows equiv).
  • .env: GIGACHAT_API_KEY, YANDEX_CLOUD_CREDS.
  • Yandex Cloud (cloud-reason) for embeddings.
  • Chroma DB indexing (repos, logs, dialogs). Criteria: chroma run indexes 10+ docs, latency <2s/query. Risks: API quotas; fallback: local Chroma.

docs.title: 2. Think MCP Integration
docs.text:
• Bridge adapter: GigaChain ↔ Think MCP (context injection from it-compass markers).
  • Prompt injection: Pull dialog logs + it-compass markers.
  • Auth protocol for MCP servers. Code Stub Example: 
    # 02_MODULES/cloud-reason/cloud_reason/gigachain_bridge.py
from langchain import LLMChain
class GigaMCPBridge:
    def inject_context(self, prompt: str, mcp_history: list) -> str:
        return f"Context: {mcp_history}\n{prompt}"
    Metrics: Throughput: 10 req/min; Context size: <8k tokens. Risks: MCP downtime; mock mode.

docs.title: 3. RAG-Chain & Proof Storage
docs.text:
• Index repos/dialogs in Chroma (via cloud-reason).
  • Inferences-verification pre-save to system-proof.
  • Metadata Tagging: thought-architecture, system-thinking-level, source-link. Criteria: 95% verification pass rate. Risks: Embed quality; manual review.

docs.title: 4. Glossary Operations
docs.text:
• Giga-Request: Session-context vector query.
  • Cross-Check: it-compass verification.
  • Trace-Storage: CoT in MD/proofs.

docs.title: 5. SourceCraft Grant Prep
docs.text:
• Self-Improving Loop: Analyze responses, suggest prompt fixes.
  • Portfolio Export: Script from system-proof → PDF/MD.

docs.title: 6. Architecture & Integrations
docs.text:
• Core: GigaChain + IT-Compass + Cloud-Reason.
  • Output: Portfolio-Organizer for cases.

docs.title: 7. Quality Control & Metrics
docs.text:
Metric Target Test MCP Latency <3s locust Verification Accuracy >90% pytest Test Coverage >92% pytest-cov Throughput 20 qpm ab -n

Tasks: See TODO.md. Responsible: AI (impl), Human (keys/review). Readiness: Plan committed, prototype runs. Risks: Deps conflicts (pip freeze check).

Next: Update TODO.md after each step.

docs.title: One-Pager: Portfolio System Architect for Grants
docs.text: Lead Architect: Екатерина Куделя | Zero→Cognitive Architect (3yr AI-led journey)

docs.title: 🎯 Problem Solved
docs.text: Non-tech to architect barrier: High. Solution: Human-in-loop methodology → replicable for 1000s noobs. Proves: Democratizes IT architecture (inclusion/education).

docs.title: 🏗️ Innovation: Self-Poetic Ecosystem
docs.text:
• Core: IT-Compass (markers), Arch-Compass (PS framework), Cloud-Reason (RAG API), ML-Registry.
  • Proof: human-decisions.md (60% AI rejects), workflow.md.
  • Demo: docker compose up → localhost:8501.

docs.title: 📊 Impact Metrics (Skeptic-Proof)
docs.text:
Before After Gain Prototyping 3 weeks 3 days 80% Test Cov - 92% +15% ind. Ecosystem Savings (100 noobs) - $400K/yr Scalable

Full: metrics/impact.md

docs.title: 🎪 Grant Fit (SourceCraft/AI Innovation)
docs.text:
• AI/NoCode: Human-directs AI agents (not copy-paste).
  • OpenSource: MIT, CI/CD ready.
  • Social: Noobs-guide templates.
  • Scale: Enterprise Docker, Q2-26: self-healing.

Ask: $Xk for RAG v2 + community course. ROI: 10x via noob acceleration.

Contact: leadarchitect.ai@gmail.com | Repo | [Video TBA]

English Version

One-Pager: Portfolio System Architect Lead Architect: Ekaterina Kudela | Zero IT → Cognitive Architect (3yr AI symphony)

Problem: Architect barrier for non-tech. Solution: Human-AI method → mass-scale.

Innovation: Self-evolving ecosystem. Decisions logged, AI 60% overruled.

Metrics: 80% time save, 92% cov. $400K/yr for 100 noobs.

Grant Match: AI leadership, OSS, inclusion.

Ready. Transform IT entry. 🚀

docs.title: Основные методологии
docs.text:
• Soft Systems Methodology (SSM): Анализ сложных проблем через rich pictures
  • Viable System Model (VSM): Модели жизнеспособных систем
  • System Dynamics: Динамика систем и петли обратной связи

docs.title: Ключевые принципы проекта
docs.text:
1. Человек управляет ИИ - 60% предложений ИИ отклонено
  2. Самоанализ - ИИ анализирует ИИ через RAG loops
  3. Метрики доверия - Логи human-decisions

Подробнее: См. ADR-001 и исходники в 02_METHODOLOGY/.
